metadata.titleDefault: HOTFIX d.o.o. | Nearshore AI & Software Consulting from Croatia
metadata.description: Croatia-based AI and software consulting firm. AI adoption, Claude Code workflows, architecture, and modernization for EU and US product teams.

footer.description: AI and software consulting for companies that want clearer technical decisions, a better development process, and more reliable software delivery.

hero.subtitle: Nearshore AI and software consulting from Croatia — for EU and US product teams that want faster technical decisions and reliable delivery.
hero.description: HOTFIX d.o.o. is a Zagreb-based AI and software consulting firm. We help EU and US teams adopt AI in real workflows, modernize codebases, and ship software without losing control of quality, security, or ownership. Claude Code enablement, architecture, and senior engineering — in your timezone.

home.introBody: HOTFIX d.o.o. is a Croatian AI and software consulting firm founded in 2022 by Josip Budalić, headquartered in Zagreb. We work with product teams across the EU and the US — bilingual delivery in Croatian and English, Mon–Fri 09:00–17:00 CET, with strong overlap with US East Coast business hours. We help teams adopt AI in real workflows, modernize legacy codebases, and deliver software reliably.
home.title: Senior engineering, not slide decks.
home.lede: We don't sell generic AI transformation narratives. Every engagement has senior ownership, never junior offshore subcontracting, and ships with code, runbooks, and decision docs the internal team owns.
home.feature1Desc: Every engagement is led by founder Josip Budalić — no body-shop subcontracting, no junior offshore, no black boxes that need us forever.
home.feature2Desc: Active expertise in .NET, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Go, Python, Kotlin/KMM, and Swift — plus Claude Code, Codex, MCP, and RAG.
home.feature3Desc: Bilingual delivery (HR/EN), CET working hours, async-friendly across timezones — EU-based with GDPR-aligned data handling by default.
home.servicesTitle: AI consulting, architecture, and reliable software delivery.
home.servicesLede: Four entry points covering AI adoption, software architecture, engineering productivity, and GDPR-aligned production readiness. Every engagement scoped to your problem after a discovery call.
home.service1Desc: Adopt AI in real workflows with guardrails, evaluations, and review discipline — Claude Code, Codex, multi-agent systems, and RAG.
home.service2Desc: Architecture review, CI/CD, testing, observability, and release process — fewer surprises in production, sustainable codebases.
home.service3Desc: Repository templates, automations, AI-assisted development standards, and Claude Code skills that cut friction without lowering quality.
home.service4Desc: Privacy by design, threat models, audit trails, and release checklists — the technical side of GDPR, CCPA, and privacy regulations for EU and US-facing software.
home.viewServices: Explore all AI and software consulting services
home.engagementTitle: Project-based or retainer. Scoped after a discovery call.
home.engagementBody: Invoiced from Croatia in EUR, VAT applied per EU rules where required. No public price list — scope, depth, and timeline vary by team and problem, so every proposal is written, specific, and signed before work starts.
home.engagement1Desc: 1–3 weeks. Written assessment of risks, options, and the recommended next step.
home.engagement2Desc: 4–12 weeks. Scoped build, AI adoption, or modernization work in parallel with delivery.
home.engagement3Desc: Monthly retainer. Architecture decisions, reviews, and escalation contact for the internal team.
home.insights1Title: How to bring AI into your development process
home.faqTitle: Common questions about working with HOTFIX d.o.o.
home.faq1Q: What does HOTFIX d.o.o. actually do?
home.faq1A: HOTFIX is a Croatian AI and software consulting firm founded in 2022, headquartered in Zagreb. We help product teams across the EU and the US adopt AI in real workflows, modernize legacy codebases, and deliver software more reliably. Engagements are project-based or retainer, scoped after a discovery call.
home.faq2Q: How do you introduce Claude Code or Codex into a team without losing code quality?
home.faq2A: We set explicit rules for review, security, and ownership, then add skills, subagents, and evaluations that fit the team's existing process. The goal is measurable adoption with code review and tests still binding — AI accelerates work, but does not bypass discipline.
home.faq3Q: Can you modernize a legacy codebase without stopping feature delivery?
home.faq3A: Yes. We work in parallel with the existing team, modernizing in slices — tests, CI/CD, observability, and architecture boundaries first — so delivery keeps moving. A full rewrite is almost never the right answer; staged modernization with documented decisions is.
home.faq4Q: Are you GDPR-aware? Do you replace legal advice?
home.faq4A: We cover the technical side of GDPR: privacy by design, data minimization, access control, audit trails, threat modeling, and release checklists. We do not replace legal counsel — but we make sure the software supports what the lawyers ask for.
home.faq5Q: Where are you based and who do you work with?
home.faq5A: HOTFIX d.o.o. is headquartered in Zagreb, Croatia, and works with clients across the EU and the US. Typical clients are CTOs, VPs of Engineering, and founders at small-to-mid product companies and scale-ups who need a senior partner who can both decide and build. Working hours Mon–Fri, 09:00–17:00 CET, with strong overlap with US East Coast mornings.
home.faq6Q: How does a project start and what does it cost?
home.faq6A: Send context — what you're building, where delivery stalls, what you want to achieve. We respond with a short discovery call, then a written proposal with scope, deliverables, timeline, and pricing in EUR. There is no public price list because every engagement is scoped to the problem.
home.ctaTitle: Have a codebase, process, or AI idea that needs grounding?
home.ctaLede: Send the context. We'll respond with a clear first step — discovery, advisory, or implementation — and a written proposal if there's fit.

about.title: About - AI & software consulting
about.description: HOTFIX d.o.o. is an AI and software consulting company that helps teams make better technical decisions, modernize software, and deliver more reliably.
about.heroDesc: HOTFIX d.o.o. helps companies integrate AI into real workflows, streamline the development process, modernize existing software, and build solutions that remain maintainable after the first delivery.
about.storyTitle: We started from a simple idea: software should help the business, not produce new complexity.
about.storyP1: HOTFIX d.o.o. was founded by Josip Budalić, with a focus on product engineering, software architecture, and practical delivery. We work with companies that need a clearer technical direction, a better development process, or a reliable implementation partner.
about.storyP2: We use AI where it genuinely shortens the path to a better result: in codebase analysis, specification preparation, review, automation, internal tools, and controlled AI-agent workflows. The focus remains on code quality, security, sustainability, and measurable impact.
about.storyP3: Beyond consulting, we also do traditional software development: backend, frontend, mobile, integrations, automations, and modernization. We choose technologies based on the problem, not the trend.
about.clearDecisionsDesc: We break down options, risks, and trade-offs before a team spends months on the wrong direction.
about.responsibleAIDesc: We introduce AI-assisted development with rules, review, security, and ownership — not as a replacement for engineering judgment.
about.sustainableDeliveryDesc: The goal isn't just to deliver faster, but to leave a codebase, process, and documentation that the team can continue using.
about.principlesLede: The best result comes when business goals, technical decisions, and the delivery process are aligned.
about.missionDesc: We help companies build and change software without unnecessary complexity. That means better preparation, clearer architecture, controlled use of AI tools, and maintainable delivery.
about.value3: AI as a tool, not an excuse for a weak process
about.value4: Code, documentation, and workflows the team can take over
about.techLede: We don't start from the stack. We start from the problem, the existing system and team, then choose the technology with the best balance of speed, quality, and maintainability.
about.dotnetDesc: Backend systems, APIs, business logic, and modernization of existing .NET applications.
about.reactDesc: Frontend applications, internal platforms, dashboards, and web products with TypeScript.
about.golangDesc: Services, APIs, and integrations where deployment simplicity and performance matter.
about.kotlinDesc: Android applications, shared mobile logic, and backend components where Kotlin makes sense.
about.kmmDesc: Sharing business logic between Android and iOS when it reduces long-term cost.
about.swiftDesc: Native iOS development for apps that need good UX and reliable Apple platform integration.
about.pythonDesc: Data processing, automation, internal tools, and AI/ML pipelines where Python is the right tool for the job.
about.processTitle: Collaboration starts with understanding the problem.
about.processLede: Before implementation, we look for the shortest reliable path: enough research for a good decision, enough specification for quality work, and enough feedback to adjust course.
about.step1Desc: We understand the business goal, existing system, constraints, and risks.
about.step2Desc: We define architecture, scope, priorities, and quality criteria.
about.step3Desc: We build iteratively, with review, testing, and transparent progress.
about.step4Desc: We deliver documentation, decisions, runbooks, and knowledge to the internal team.
about.ctaTitle: Need a partner for a technical decision, AI workflow, or delivery?
about.ctaLede: We'll quickly map where the biggest risk is, what the realistic scope is, and whether consulting, implementation, or a combination makes more sense.

services.title: Services - AI consulting, software consulting & development
services.description: AI consulting, Claude Code enablement, multi-agent systems, software architecture, engineering processes, custom software development, integrations, and modernization.
services.heroTitle: AI and software consulting from decision to delivery.
services.heroDesc: We help teams integrate AI into real processes, improve software delivery, modernize existing systems, and build custom solutions with a clear business purpose.
services.specializedDesc: Three specialized entry points when you need a quick assessment, a structured plan, or hands-on support.
services.specAIDesc: AI adoption, Claude Code, multi-agent workflows, guardrails, and production integration.
services.specQualityDesc: Privacy by design, documentation, testing, and production readiness.
services.specProductivityDesc: CI/CD, tooling, automation, and better workflows for less friction in development.
services.service1Desc: We help select AI use cases that make business sense, define guardrails, and embed AI into existing workflows without unnecessary risk.
services.service1f1: AI adoption strategy & use case prioritization
services.service1f3: LLM integration into internal tools and business processes
services.service1f4: Evaluations, testing, and AI feature monitoring
services.service2Desc: We introduce Claude Code, Codex, and similar tools into the development process so they accelerate work without bypassing quality, review, and ownership.
services.service2f2: Claude Code skills, subagents, and review standards
services.service2f3: Spec-driven development and clearer task handoff
services.service2f4: Security rules, code review, and test disciplines
services.service2f5: Impact measurement without losing control of the codebase
services.service3Desc: We help leadership and teams make technical decisions, reduce delivery friction, and set up a process that better maintains quality.
services.service3f3: CI/CD, testing, observability, and release process
services.service3f4: Legacy codebase modernization without stopping development
services.service3f5: Roadmap of decisions, risks, and trade-offs
services.service4Desc: We design and build web, mobile, backend, integrations, internal tools, and automations that solve concrete business problems.
services.service4f1: Web applications, dashboards, and internal tools
services.service4f3: Mobile development with Kotlin, Swift, and KMM
services.service4f4: Automations and modernization of existing systems
services.service4f5: .NET, TypeScript, React, Go, Python, and other proven stacks
services.stackTitle: Technology is a tool, not a starting point.
services.stackLede: We use proven technologies when they naturally fit the problem, team, and existing codebase. We don't push stacks for marketing.
services.processTitle: A process that reduces risk before the codebase takes it on.
services.processLede: We work structured enough that decisions are clear, but practical enough that delivery momentum isn't lost.
services.phase1Desc: We understand the business goal, existing system, team capacity, data, risks, and where AI or a better process can bring real value.
services.phase2Desc: We define decisions, system boundaries, integrations, quality criteria, and an implementation plan the team can understand and maintain.
services.phase3Desc: We build iteratively, with code review, automated checks, clear task handoff, and feedback from real usage.
services.phase4Desc: We prepare documentation, runbooks, decisions, and recommendations for continuing development — whether the internal team takes over or we keep working together.
services.darkCtaTitle: Have a process, codebase, or AI idea that needs grounding?
services.darkCtaDesc: Send us a brief context. In the first conversation, we can map the problem, risks, and the most useful next step.

contact.title: Contact - let's talk about your software project
contact.description: Send an inquiry for AI consulting, software consulting, Claude Code workflows, custom software development, modernization, or delivery process improvement.
contact.heroTitle: Let's start with a clear technical direction.
contact.heroDesc: Tell us what you're building, where the process stalls, or where you want to check if AI has real value. We'll direct the first response toward a concrete next step.
contact.sectionTitle: Let's talk about your project or process
contact.sectionDesc: You can send an early inquiry, an existing problem, an AI workflow idea, a modernization need, or a concrete development brief. A perfect specification isn't required — enough context is.
contact.responseDesc: We respond during business hours, as soon as we can meaningfully assess the inquiry.
contact.helpTitle: What helps in the first inquiry?
contact.help1: What you want to achieve and why it matters now
contact.help2: Existing stack, codebase, or process if you have one
contact.help3: Where you see the biggest risk, delay, or manual work
contact.help4: Whether you want consulting, implementation, or a combination
contact.faq1Q: What kind of projects do you work on?
contact.faq1A: We work on AI adoption, Claude Code workflows, multi-agent systems, software architecture, web and mobile applications, backend systems, integrations, automations, and modernization of existing software.
contact.faq2Q: What does the start of a collaboration look like?
contact.faq2A: We start with a brief conversation and review of goals, current state, and risks. After that, we propose scope, technical direction, and first steps with the best value-to-risk ratio.
contact.faq3Q: Can you help an existing team?
contact.faq3A: Yes. We can work as an external advisor, hands-on engineering support, or a partner for a specific part of delivery, with documentation and knowledge transfer to the internal team.
contact.faq4Q: Do you work with AI tools like Claude Code?
contact.faq4A: Yes. We help teams introduce AI coding tools responsibly: through rules, skills, subagents, review standards, security constraints, testing, and measurable workflows.

blog.heroDesc: We write about AI workflows, Claude Code, specifications, automation, and delivery processes from the perspective of people who actually build and maintain software.
blog.ctaTitle: Want to apply this in your team?
blog.ctaDesc: We can help evaluate an AI workflow, improve your software delivery process, or take on a specific part of implementation.
blog.authorBio: Josip runs HOTFIX d.o.o. and works on software architecture, AI-assisted development workflows, codebase modernization, and practical software delivery.
